title: AWHCT AMC – Various Posts – 19 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Restoration Engineer, Asst. Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: AWHCT AMC Recruitment 2026: 19 Restoration Engineer, Asst. Manager and More vacancies. Apply online from 21 May to 11 June 2026 at ahmedabadcity.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in History/Archaeology/Anthropology/Sociology/Heritage Management/Cultural Studies, Bachelor's in Architecture, M.Arch, ITI/Diploma/Higher Degree in Draftsmanship/Architecture/Civil Engineering, Master's in Tourism/Business Management/Urban Planning, Master's in Mass Communication/Visual Communication/Design/Journalism, Master's in Social Work/Heritage Management/Development Studies/Economics, Bachelor's or Master's in Tourism Management/Event Management/Hospitality/Business Administration, Master's in IT/Computer Science/Data Science, Retired Assistant Civil Engineer, Retired Technical Supervisor

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ahmedabadcity.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
